overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a vast mountainous landscape during golden hour. The journey transitions from rocky terrain through fields of colorful flowers while encountering a massive mechanical creature during a temporary red storm, ending at a beachfront.

agents.ego_description: running across rocky terrain toward distant mountains

entered.detail: arid rocky ground with scattered stones and boulders
hazy mountain range silhouetted against the golden sky
patches of dry grass between the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a rocky, arid terrain with sparse grass patches. Large rock formations dominate the foreground while hazy mountains stretch across the horizon under warm golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: white flower field under red storm

events.description: sky turns deep red and visibility drops as a storm begins
character adjusts path to run parallel to massive mechanical creature

agents.ego_description: sprinting through white flower field parallel to a massive machine

notable_agents.action: massive mechanical Tallneck creature walking slowly through the field emitting red light

entered.detail: dense field of white flowers covering the ground
giraffe-like machine with circular head and long neck walking through the field
deep crimson sky with heavy atmospheric haze obscuring the horizon

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically as a red storm descends, bathing the white flower field in crimson light. A massive mechanical Tallneck creature emerges on the right, walking slowly as the character runs parallel to it through the storm.

events.description: red storm clears and golden hour lighting returns

entered.detail: dense meadow of bright yellow flowers covering the rolling terrain

segments.scene_description: The red storm suddenly clears, returning the scene to warm golden hour lighting. The character runs through a dense field of yellow wildflowers with mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: transitions from yellow to white flower field

agents.ego_description: continuing through white flower field toward the coast

entered.detail: expansive field of white flowers stretching toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a vast white flower meadow as the character continues running toward a distant coastline. The golden sunlight creates a warm atmosphere across the open field.

agents.ego_description: running through purple flowers toward the beach

entered.detail: vibrant purple wildflowers covering the coastal dunes
sandy beach leading down to the water
calm ocean water visible beyond the beach

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a vibrant purple flower field as the terrain slopes down toward a sandy beach. The ocean becomes visible in the distance as the journey continues along the coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey across a diverse wilderness that transforms from an arid highland into a vibrant coastal meadow. It begins with the character running across rocky, arid terrain under the warm glow of golden hour sunlight, with hazy mountains framing the horizon. As the environment shifts, a red storm descends to bathe a field of white flowers in crimson light while a massive mechanical Tallneck emerges and walks parallel to the character. The scene then opens back into golden light as the storm clears, transitioning from dense yellow wildflowers into a vast white meadow that stretches toward a distant coastline. Finally, the terrain slopes down through a vibrant field of purple flowers, leading the character toward a sandy beach where the ocean becomes visible in the distance.
